description: Use this API to replicate the working case in IEEE common tape format. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rwcm(opt, out, ofile)

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Dc line/facts/gne device option. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: ofile
parameters.description: Name of the output file (when out is 0). (input; no default allowed).

opt.description: ignore dc lines, FACTS devices, and GNE devices.

out.description: direct output to the data file specified by OFILE.
direct output to the current report device.

error_codes.description: buses in case with 5 or 6 digit bus numbers.
n buses in case but IEEE common format can handle only 9999.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
